overview: VibeMail is a digital scrapbook-style messaging app where messages are collectible aesthetic objects. Inspired by Japanese retro stationery, fruity kawaii, and juminocore — the app lets you compose and unbox letters with photos, handwritten notes, stamps, wax seals, polaroid frames, and layered decorative elements that feel like physical stationery objects.
features: Juminocore visual design system with warm cream, apple green, and cherry red palette
2-column inbox grid with varied tile shapes (fruit cards, parcels, drink cups, stamp squares)
Compose screen with stacked rotated note/photo/music cards and preview container
Scrapbook-style message view with overlapping elements and stamp-style header
Visual identity board profile with charm clusters and collections grid
Collectible card friend list with pastel fruit-label themes
8 unboxing animations using real assets (locket, soda float, clover field, polaroids)
Handwritten Caveat typography for labels and decorative text
Real stamp, wax seal, envelope, and paper texture assets throughout
